name: candidate_name
description: Full name of the candidate

name: email
description: Email address of the candidate

name: phone
description: Phone number of the candidate

name: location
description: City, state, or full address of the candidate

name: summary
description: Professional summary or objective statement from the resume

name: total_years_of_experience
description: Total years of professional experience

name: skills
description: List of technical and soft skills mentioned in the resume

name: education
description: Educational qualifications including degree, institution, and graduation year

name: education.degree
description: Degree or certification obtained (e.g., B.Tech, MBA, PhD)

name: education.institution
description: Name of the university or educational institution

name: education.graduation_year
description: Year of graduation or expected graduation

name: work_experience
description: Professional work experience entries including company, role, duration, and responsibilities

name: work_experience.company
description: Name of the employer or company

name: work_experience.job_title
description: Job title or role held at the company

name: work_experience.start_date
description: Start date of employment

name: work_experience.end_date
description: End date of employment or 'Present' if currently employed

name: work_experience.responsibilities
description: Key responsibilities and achievements in the role

name: certifications
description: Professional certifications and licenses

name: certifications.name
description: Name of the certification

name: certifications.issuing_organization
description: Organization that issued the certification

name: certifications.year
description: Year the certification was obtained

name: languages
description: Languages spoken by the candidate
